adText:
We started Blue Guardian with a few thousand dollars. 💰No big investors. No corporate backing.Just a teenager who saved up, a friend who put in his entire student loan, and one big idea:What if a prop firm actually worked for traders instead of against them?When I was 17, I tried to get funded. The prices were impossible. The rules were designed to make you fail.So at 18, I built something different.→ No restrictive rules
→ No overpriced challenges
→ No gatekeepingA few thousand dollars turned into 180,000+ traders worldwide.We're just getting started.Get funded

Get started with FXIFY today.

adText:
Most prop firms don't WANT you to pass.

They want your evaluation fee. 

Again. 

And again. 

And again.

Ridiculous profit targets. 

Daily loss limits that stop you out before lunch. 

Hidden rules that disqualify you AFTER you've done the work.

It's exhausting.

Blue Guardian was built different.

We use EOD (End of Day) drawdown rules... 

Which means you can actually BREATHE while you trade.

No daily loss limits strangling your strategy.

No gotcha clauses buried in 47 pages of fine print.

Just straightforward rules, real payouts, and a prop firm that actually WANTS you funded.

Because here's the thing...

When YOU win, WE win.

✅ Fair EOD drawdown rules
✅ Keep 80-90% profits
✅ 48-hour payouts
✅ Up to $400K accounts
✅ No hidden traps

Stop feeding money to firms designed to fail you.

Get funded by one that actually pays.

👉 Start your challenge: www.blueguardian.com/

When I first started trading, I had nothing. No training, no mentors, and practically no money.  Sound Familiar?

Are you at work? Or maybe scrolling through aimlessly after a 9-5 shift, wishing for a different reality?
That’s where most of my clients start.

You Can Trade Options Like The Pros: Keep It Simple!  10x Trading Champion Chuck Hughes has created a strategy that gives novice traders the tool to achieve their dreams–
One trade at a time.

This Is Your Opportunity To Take Control of Wealth… With this simple strategy, you can leverage what’s already in your portfolio and possibly see returns 10x higher than average, without having to day trade.

adText:
🚀 Think you don't have time to create content? Switch to documenting your everyday activities and watch your engagement soar! With the FLYGTI methodology, you're not just creating content; you're capturing moments to distribute across every major platform.

Start with a simple video. From there, extract the audio and transcribe it to text, effectively tripling your output with minimal effort. This 'back-to-front' strategy ensures your voice reaches as far as possible—imagine touching lives like Mariah Carey's songs, but in the digital world.

🎥 Document your experiences, let AI refine them, and then share across Facebook, LinkedIn, YouTube, Google, Twitter, and Instagram. Millions will see your content, and a small percentage engaging deeply can significantly impact your business. Remember, the best known beats the best.

👉 Ready to transform how you create and distribute content? Join our training to learn how to make your voice heard and turn your social media into a lucrative venture. Don't just be heard—be remembered!
